transcript:
CALLER: Hello. I was just wondering, kya aapke yahan interpreter available hai? Meri naani ko Marathi mein samjhana padta hai doctors ko.
AGENT: Ji zaroor. Humare zyaadatar doctors aur nursing staff Marathi mein baat kar sakte hain. Aap appointment ke time mention kar dena, hum ensure karenge ki Marathi-speaking staff ho naani ji ke saath.
CALLER: Bahut acha. Aur agar koi Hindi bolne wala chahiye toh?
AGENT: Hindi bhi koi problem nahi. Hum Marathi, Hindi aur English mein comfortable hain. Patients ki comfort hamare liye priority hai.
CALLER: Bahut acha clinic lagta hai aapka. Shukriya.
AGENT: Aapka swagat hai. Kab bhi zaroorat ho, humse milne aana!
